title: Alternating shifts; twenty-four hours service
doc_html:
§1963.  Alternating shifts; twenty-four hours service

The forces shall alternate.  On the day of the shift of forces the day force shall be on duty twenty-four hours.  This Section does not apply to the City of New Orleans.
doc_text:
§1963.  Alternating shifts; twenty-four hours service
The forces shall alternate.  On the day of the shift of forces the day force shall be on duty twenty-four hours.  This Section does not apply to the City of New Orleans.
